sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63178" key="liqoqesi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐθο-θεσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n63178.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">placing of stones</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0697.tlg001:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Polyh.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
